name: G1→G2 Zone 1 — Highland Approach Wandering Monsters
description: Wandering monster table for Zone 1 (Days 1–2): Temperate-to-alpine. Still inhabited. Giants have been through here. Wildlife is present. Check frequency: once per 8 hours of travel, once per 8 hours of rest.

results.text: 1d4 Hill Giants (returning south from a raiding trip) [PF2e Lvl 7 each]
2d6 Orcs (G1-allied; spotted the party leaving the Steading) [PF2e Lvl 1 each]
1d4 Ogres (G1 work crew heading to the Steading) [PF2e Lvl 3 each]
1 Wyvern (circling above; attacks if the party seems weak) [PF2e Lvl 6]
2d4 Bugbears (independent band, not G1-aligned) [PF2e Lvl 3 each]
1 Giant Eagle (not hostile; circles and watches) [PF2e Lvl 4]
1d6 Trolls (mountain variety; hunting in a loose pack) [PF2e Lvl 5 each]
2d6 Mountain Dwarves (Mror Holds patrol; neutral, suspicious) [PF2e Lvl 2 each]
1d4 Stone Giants (traveling through; neutral; know where the Rift is) [PF2e Lvl 9 each]
1d6 Hippogriffs (flock, territorial over a stretch of ridgeline) [PF2e Lvl 3 each]
1 Roc (hunting; PCs are prey-sized) [PF2e Lvl 13 — flee]
HAZARD — Rockslide: DC 16 Reflex or 4d6 bludgeoning + pinned (DC 20 Athletics to free)
